title: Dream of the Red Chamber
author: Cao Xueqin
description: The Dream of the Red Chamber, a cornerstone of Chinese literature, intricately weaves a tapestry of family dynamics, societal expectations, and the intricacies of love within the framework of 18th-century Qing Dynasty China. Cao Xueqin employs a rich literary style, characterized by lyrical prose, vivid imagery, and profound psychological depth, to illustrate the poignant realities of human existence. The narrative, which revolves around the rise and fall of the Jia family, delves into themes of...
subjects: Near and far eastern fiction (fictional works by one author)
